conversation_history.content: Hello! I can help you with loan eligibility. Could you please provide your Monthly Income, Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure (in years or months)?
I can only assist with loan eligibility queries. Could you share your Monthly Income, Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure?
ok whatever, income 1 lakh, emi 30k, down payment 8 lakh, 5 years
Thank you for providing the details. I have extracted the following information: Monthly Income: ₹1,00,000, Existing EMI: ₹30,000, Down Payment: ₹8,00,000, Loan Tenure: 5 years.
